form.formComment: Won two starts back over 352m at this track. Last start she finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 390m at this track behind Hara's Pumpkin beaten 5.5 lengths (21.84). Draw likely to suit. Going well and can bounce back to winning form.
